creator: david.morgan@gmail.com
text:
I get the same error.

$ uname -a
FreeBSD goodwill 11.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #0 r272058: Wed Sep 24 14:37:38 BST 2014     root@goodwill:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

$ svn info|grep Revision
Revision: 272058

virtualbox-ose-additions rebuilt after doing build/install world/kernel, so everything is definitely in sync.
